name: Wood and Metal Desk with Shelves Natural - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring minimalistic style and organization to your space with this Wood and Metal Desk with Shelves from Room Essentials™. This rectangular desk is supported by a black metal base and features two open shelves on one of the sides. Place your stationery and books on the side shelves for ease of access, and use the wooden tabletop for laptops, desktops and other work essentials. Designed in a black hue with natural wood tones, this desk offers easy integration into any room's decor scheme.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 40 inches
Overall Height: 30 inches
Overall Depth: 20 inches
Distance between front legs: 29.2 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 15.7 inches
Distance between legs supporting shelves: 5.4 inches
Shelving width: 9.3inches
Shelving depth: 15.6 inches
Distance between shelves: 11 inches
Distance from floor to bottom shelf: 5.7 inches
